name: toggle-button-group
description: Exclusive toggle button group where only one button can be active at a time, with icon support.

props.name: buttons
props.description: Array of button definitions to render in the group.

props.name: value
props.description: The value of the currently selected button.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Callback fired when the user selects a different button.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: When true, each button expands to fill an equal share of the container width.
